match.userMessage:
Natural cinematic beach lifestyle photography of SCARLETT in light casual beach clothing suitable for walking while carrying a canvas tote bag crouching at the shoreline and pressing the tube from (CORAL_LIPSTICK) upright into the wet sand in a tensed planting motion poised to rise and step back, larger wave rolling in with white foam curling toward the tube on the Bondi Beach shoreline surrounded by shallow turquoise water and dynamic incoming waves across the sand, bright natural daylight with clean directional shadows and warm sun highlights creating tactile real-world texture, captured on handheld camera at eye level with shallow depth of field keeping the foreground action sharp while softly blurring the approaching wave and ocean background, modern social-first product photography with tactile editorial energy true-to-life colors and airy high-key treatment.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH SHORELINE - DAY - Wet sand shoreline at Bondi Beach where waves gently wash over bare feet
    - Image 3 [ELEMENT REF]: CORAL_LIPSTICK - A slim metallic lipstick tube containing a vivid bright coral bullet
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
